reasoning: The Lean signature matches the informal statement on all relevant points: T is a self-adjoint endomorphism on a finite-dimensional inner product space over 𝕜 (RCLike covers Axler's F ∈ {ℝ, ℂ}); λ is an arbitrary scalar; ε > 0.
